---
title: "Park Butte June 2021"
startDate: "2021-06-18T00:00:00.000Z"
endDate: "2021-06-19T00:00:00.000Z"
---

Maybe snow will be good? ~4 miles up, ~2,500 ft gain, so 3 hours up. 1.5 hours down?

- [May 31](https://www.wta.org/go-hiking/trip-reports/trip_report-2021-06-02-0240910002) (Monday) - Got 1.2 miles from the trailhead, trail completely covered by snow, "crampons highly recommended", didn't see other people (but that was on a Monday)
- [June 11th](https://www.facebook.com/groups/washingtonhikersandclimbers/permalink/3324113621148295) - Currently ~2ft of snow still at the trailhead and parking is about ~1/2 mile from the TH.
- [June 13th](https://www.alltrails.com/trail/us/washington/park-butte-lookout-trail) - Had to park .8 miles from trail head due to snow . Trial was pretty much covered under snow please use offline map with gps

Satellite on 6/4...

## Weather

Forecast at 5,000 ft: [Weekly ](https://forecast.weather.gov/MapClick.php?lat=48.71647582790851&amp;lon=-121.85633897781373&amp;site=all&amp;smap=1#.YMeKPr6Sn-g)| [Hourly](https://forecast.weather.gov/MapClick.php?w0=t&amp;w1=td&amp;w2=hi&amp;w3=sfcwind&amp;w3u=1&amp;w4=sky&amp;w5=pop&amp;w6=rh&amp;w7=rain&amp;w8=thunder&amp;w10u=0&amp;w13u=1&amp;AheadHour=96&amp;Submit=Submit&amp;FcstType=graphical&amp;textField1=48.7165&amp;textField2=-121.8563&amp;site=all&amp;unit=0&amp;dd=&amp;bw=)

![Last updated 6/18 9:50 AM](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2021/06/Plotter.vjkuyqK.png)

## Itinerary

Sunset is at 9:16 PM. 2:30 hr drive, ~3:00 hrs up, ~1:30 hrs down. Sunrise is 5:06 AM

- **Thursday**
  - 2:15 PM - Leave home
    - 4:45 PM - At trailhead (~65 degrees, partly sunny)
    - 5:00 PM - Skinning up (3.5 miles, 2,500 ft gain)
    - 8:00 PM - At lookout
    - Sleep there (low 40's)
- **Friday**
  - 5:00 AM - See sunrise
    - 6:00 AM - Ski down (~45 degrees, sunny, hopefully snow has started to soften)
    - 7:30 AM - At car
    - 8:00 AM - Drive to Bellingham
    - 9:15 AM - In Bellingham (1:15 hr drive) - The Gray North Waffle Co opens at 8am and is open till 5pm
    - 1:00 PM - Head home (1:30 hr drive)
    - 2:30 PM - Home

## Itinerary

2:15 hr drive, ~3:00 hrs up, ~1:30 hrs down

- 3:00 AM - Leave home
- 5:15 AM - At trailhead, get ready
- 5:40 AM - Skinning up
- 8:40 AM - At lookout
- 9:10 AM - Ski down
- 10:40 AM - Back at car
- 11:00 AM - Drive to The Gray North Waffle Co (1:20 hr drive)
- 12:20 PM - Eat waffles!
